tools.description: Calculate the similarity score between two classes using their embeddings. Returns a value between 0 and 1, where 1 means identical. Any model from listEmbeddingModels can be used (can_embed not required).

classIri1.description: The IRI of the first class

classIri2.description: The IRI of the second class

model.description: The embedding model to use. Any model from listEmbeddingModels works.

tools.name: getClassSimilarity

tools.description: Find classes similar to a given class by IRI using pre-computed embeddings. Unlike searchClassesWithEmbeddingModel, this uses stored embeddings so any model from listEmbeddingModels can be used (can_embed not required).

classIri.description: The IRI of the class to find similar classes for

model.description: The embedding model to use. Any model from listEmbeddingModels works.

tools.name: getSimilarClasses

tools.description: Get all ancestors for a class in OLS
tools.name: getAncestors

tools.description: Get all descendants of a class in OLS
tools.name: getDescendants

tools.description: List available embedding models for LLM-based semantic search. Call this first to discover which models can be used with llmSearch and llmSearchClasses. Returns models with their names and whether they support live embedding.
tools.name: listEmbeddingModels

tools.description: OpenAI compliant tool to retrieve an entity from OLS by ID returned from the search tool. The ID must be of the format ontologyid+entityIri, e.g. go+http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0008150. IDs in this format are returned by the OpenAI compliant 'search' tool.
tools.name: fetch

tools.description: OpenAI compliant tool to search OLS for a query string

includeObsoleteEntities.description: Whether to include obsolete entities in search results. Default is false.

tools.name: search

tools.description: Search OLS entities using semantic/embedding-based similarity. Uses vector embeddings to find semantically similar entities, which can find related concepts even when exact terms don't match. IMPORTANT: Call listEmbeddingModels first - only models with can_embed=true can be used for text search.

model.description: The embedding model to use. Must have can_embed=true from listEmbeddingModels.

ontologyId.description: Optional ontology ID to filter results

query.description: The natural language query to search for semantically similar entities

tools.name: searchWithEmbeddingModel

tools.description: Search all classes in OLS for a query string

includeObsoleteEntities.description: Whether to include obsolete entities in search results. Default is false.

tools.name: searchClasses

tools.description: Search classes using semantic/embedding-based similarity. Uses vector embeddings to find semantically similar classes, which can find related concepts even when exact terms don't match. IMPORTANT: Call listEmbeddingModels first - only models with can_embed=true can be used for text search.

model.description: The embedding model to use. Must have can_embed=true from listEmbeddingModels.

ontologyId.description: Optional ontology ID to filter results

query.description: The natural language query to search for semantically similar classes

tools.name: searchClassesWithEmbeddingModel
